name: Box
description: List items in a Box folder, get details for a file, and search for files, folders, or web links across the account.

auth.hint: Create a Box app, complete OAuth 2.0 (or Client Credentials Grant for server-to-server access), and send the resulting access token as Authorization: Bearer <ACCESS_TOKEN>.

tools.name: list_folder_items
tools.description: List the files, folders, and web links contained in a Box folder.

params.name: folder_id
params.description: Folder identifier; use 0 for the root folder.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of item attributes to include in the response.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum items per page; up to 1000.

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based offset of the first item to return; defaults to 0.

params.name: sort
params.description: Secondary sort attribute: id, name, date, or size.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for a Box file by its ID.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of file attributes to include in the response.

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search for files, folders, or web links across the account by query text and optional filters.

params.name: query
params.description: Search text matched against item names, descriptions, and file content; supports AND/OR/NOT operators and quoted exact matches.

params.name: type
params.description: Restrict results to file, folder, or web_link.

params.name: file_extensions
params.description: Comma-separated file extensions (without dots) to restrict results to.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum results per page; default 30, maximum 200.

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based starting position; values beyond 10,000 are rejected.
